## Setup

If a Dev Container or equivalent environment setup is required, describe it first.

If tests require test data generation or environment scripts, run those steps before test execution.

```bash
dotnet tool restore
dotnet restore
dotnet build
dotnet test
```

Example pre-test step when required:

```bash
# Generate test data or configure environment before running tests
./scripts/prepare-test-assets.sh
dotnet test
```
